Market Opportunity

This is not a small problem

03 / 09

0%

of India lives in rural areas

The people most affected by welfare gaps — with the least access to information

0+

Active central government schemes

Covering agriculture, education, health, housing — most citizens know about 2 or 3

₹0

Allocated annually for welfare

A massive budget — but a broken last mile means most of it never reaches the right hands

<0%

Average scheme utilization rate

Over 70% of eligible citizens never complete an application — not by choice, but by confusion

The gap between allocated and delivered is not a policy failure. It is an information failure. And information failures are exactly what technology fixes.

05 / 09

The Agentic Loop

This is not a chatbot. It’s an autonomous welfare agent.

🇮🇳 LangGraph
OBSERVE
Parse input
Extract profile fields
REASON
Run eligibility engine
against 500+ schemes
ACT
Generate matched schemes
+ doc checklist
VERIFY
Ask clarifying questions
if data incomplete

Live trace — demo input:

"I am a farmer in Bihar with 2 acres land, annual income ₹80,000"
OBSERVE occupation=farmer · income=80000 · state=Bihar · land=2 acres
REASON 7 schemes matched · PM-KISAN 100% · PMFBY 100%
ACT Response generated with benefit amounts + doc checklist
VERIFY Profile complete ✓ — no clarifying question needed
FastAPI + React LangGraph orchestration Multi-LLM fallback chain Persistent session memory

Core Features

What makes Janshayak AI different

06 / 09

Lives on WhatsApp

No app to download. No account to create. No portal to navigate.

If you have WhatsApp, you already have Janshayak AI. That’s the entire onboarding process.

500M+
WhatsApp users in India already covered — day one
Zero install friction Works on 2G Feature phones too

Talks Your Language

Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Bengali and 8 more.
Voice or text — whatever feels natural.

Bhashini powered 12 languages

Knows If You Qualify

Not just a search engine — a real eligibility engine.
Checks age, income, location, occupation.

Yes or No — with reason

Tells You What To Bring

Plain language document checklists.
No jargon. No guessing. Just: bring these 3 things.

Step by step No jargon

LangGraph Agent Orchestration

Autonomous OBSERVE → REASON → ACT → VERIFY loop.
FastAPI + React stack. Multi-LLM fallback for reliability.

LangGraph Agentic loop

Business Model

We don’t charge the farmer. We charge the people responsible for reaching him.

07 / 09

State Governments

B2G SaaS licensing

  • White-label welfare navigator for citizens
  • Embed in CSC kiosks and district portals
  • Multilingual helpline integration

“Higher scheme utilization = better governance scores”

Pricing model

₹15–25 / active user / month

Corporates — CSR

Primary revenue stream

  • Deploy in rural operational areas
  • Measurable impact reports for compliance
  • Citizens helped, schemes accessed, ₹ unlocked

“2% CSR mandate compliance — with real, auditable proof”

Pricing model

₹20–50L / CSR program

NGOs & Fintechs

API licensing

  • Eligibility engine API for their platforms
  • Multilingual voice layer — plug and play
  • Build welfare features without the stack

“Add welfare intelligence to any product in one API call”

Pricing model

₹0.50–2 / eligibility query

Total Addressable Market
₹800 Cr+ govt. digital inclusion budgets / yr
